top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ca_country,
    ca_state,
    ca_county,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(cs_list_price) AS avg_list_price,
    AVG(cs_coupon_amt) AS avg_coupon_amt,
    AVG(cs_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price,
    AVG(cs_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit,
    AVG(c_birth_year) AS avg_birth_year,
    AVG(cd_dep_count) AS avg_dep_count
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_custom...

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ca_country,
    ca_state,
    ca_county,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(cs_list_price) AS avg_list_price,
    AVG(cs_coupon_amt) AS avg_coupon_amt,
    AVG(cs_sales_price) AS avg_sales_price,
    AVG(cs_net_profit) AS avg_net_profit,
    AVG(c_birth_year) AS avg_birth_year,
    AVG(cd_dep_count) AS avg_dep_count
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_custom...

WITH filtered_sales AS (
  SELECT
    cs_quantity,
    cs_list_price,
    cs_coupon_amt,
    cs_sales_price,
    cs_net_profit,
    c_birth_year,
    cd_dep_count,
    i_item_id,
    ca_country,
    ca_state,
    ca_county
  FROM catalog_sales
  JOIN item ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
  JOIN customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
  JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
  JOIN customer_demographics cd1 ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk...

  SELECT
    i.i_item_id,
    ca.ca_country,
    ca.ca_state,
    ca.ca_county,
    cs.cs_quantity,
    cs.cs_list_price,
    cs.cs_coupon_amt,
    cs.cs_sales_price,
    cs.cs_net_profit,
    c.c_birth_year,
    cd1.cd_dep_count
  FROM catalog_sales cs
  JOIN item i ON cs.cs_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  JOIN customer c ON cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
  JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    ca_country,
    ca_state,
    ca_county,
    AVG(cs_quantity) AS avg_quantity,
    AVG(cs_list_price) AS avg_list_price,

JOIN item ON catalog_sales.cs_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_custom...
